attributes.additional_details: .Petition Details: Advances in artificial intelligence have made it possible to replicate a person’s voice and visual appearance with alarming accuracy. Petition Title: Protect Individual Rights Over Voice and Likeness in the Age of Artificial Intelligence. Petition Statement:We call on the UK Government to introduce legislation that ensures individuals have exclusive ownership and control over the use of their voice and visible likeness, including any AI-generated replicas.Petition
attributes.background: We call on the UK Government to introduce legislation that ensures individuals have exclusive ownership and control over the use of their voice and visible likeness, including any AI-generated replicas

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Give UK citizens legal ownership of their face, voice, and likeness" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/748841
